examples: Hedge funds are perfect examples of the speculative trader and arbitrageur.
In pure or riskless arbitrage transactions, the purchase and re-sale of the asset in question are conducted simultaneously, thus the arbitrageur does not risk any of their own funds.
One such arbitrageur is Jeremy Schoemaker, a search marketing consultant and well-known Web denizen.
Ahhh, but here we come to the great temptation of every pure arbitrageur.
Ivan Boesky used to say that he was a pure arbitrageur when of course he was really insider trading.
